note_seed_override: Seed data provides explicit USD architecture fee of $216,000 and payment schedule in USD. Per Tomás instructions, USD amounts from seed data are used in scope-of-work.json payment schedule. MXN cost basis preserved for local market reference.

architecture_fee = MXN 63,600,000 × 0.12 = MXN 7,632,000 (USD 216,000 per seed data — seed data value used in payment schedule)
